title: Uncompressed IPv6 address format in lichen_ipv6_addr_to_str logs 39 chars vs 10-20
description: ipv6_addr.c lines 157-167: Always formats as 'fe80:0000:0000:0000:...' (39 chars) instead of RFC 5952 compressed 'fe80::...' (~15 chars). Not an efficiency issue (logging path, not hot), but worth noting the header documents this as intentional (line 54-56). No change needed - the explicit uncompressed format is arguably easier to parse visually in logs.
close_reason: By design: header comment (lines 54-56) explicitly documents LICHEN uses uncompressed lowercase hex format for visual clarity in logs
